name: Matrix

💬 No one can be told what the bug is
📦 Shipping the red pill as a feature
🌐 Everything that has a beginning has a stack trace

🧘 Free your mind, free your linter
🟢 There is no real world, only runtime

🎭 Playing Neo in the sequel nobody asked for
🔧 Morpheus fixing the simulation with duct tape

🥩 I know this steak doesn't exist
